name: Tee Box Idaho Falls
about: Tee Box Idaho Falls is an indoor virtual golf and training facility featuring TrackMan technology for realistic golf simulation and performance tracking. The venue offers a comprehensive golf improvement environment, combining high-tech simulators with fitness training, coaching, and club fitting services. Designed for year-round practice and play, it caters to golfers of all levels with professional-grade equipment and personalized instruction programs. The facility integrates golf, fitness, and community, providing a one-stop destination for both casual play and serious skill development.
why_golfers_like_it: Professional-grade TrackMan technology for accurate swing data
Combines golf training with fitness and nutrition programs
Expert coaching and club fitting services
Community-focused environment with leagues and events

food_and_drink.notes: Full kitchen and food service available

simulator_hardware.notes: Dual radar and camera systems for precise club and ball tracking

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: You can bring your own clubs or rent clubs at the facility. Club rentals are available for use with the simulators.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: The facility has a full kitchen and food service available. No BYOB policy is mentioned.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: 30 minutes at Tee Box is comparable to 90 minutes on the course, making it efficient for practice and play.

faq.question: Is the facility kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, the facility offers youth programs and is designed to be welcoming for golfers of all ages and skill levels.
